zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Stuteville Heiress of Cottingham於大約1216年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭時，她的父親Nicholas de Stuteville26歲，母親Dervorguilla Galloway23歲。她於1229年5月29日之前與Hugh le Wake Sheriff of Yorkshire在英國越可爾可廷加姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1276年4月6日之前在英國越可爾可廷加姆，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Stuteville Heiress of Cottingham于大约1216年出生在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭时，她的父亲Nicholas de Stuteville26岁，母亲Dervorguilla Galloway23岁。她于1229年5月29日之前与Hugh le Wake Sheriff of Yorkshire在英国越可爾可廷加姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1276年4月6日之前在英国越可爾可廷加姆，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stuteville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Estouteville or Etoutteville in Seine-Maritime.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Stuteville Heiress of Cottingham was born about 1216, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Nicholas de Stuteville, was 26 and her mother, Dervorguilla Galloway, was 23. She married Hugh le Wake Sheriff of Yorkshire before 29 May 1229, in Cottingham, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died before 6 April 1276, in Cottingham, Yorkshire, England, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Stuteville Heiress of Cottingham est née environ 1216, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas de Stuteville, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Dervorguilla Galloway, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh le Wake Sheriff of Yorkshire avant 29 mai 1229, à Cottingham, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 6 avril 1276, à Cottingham, Everwyck, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan de Stuteville Heiress of Cottingham um 1216 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas de Stuteville 26 und ihre Mutter Dervorguilla Galloway 23. Sie hat vor 29. Mai 1229 in Cottingham, Yorkshire, England Hugh le Wake Sheriff of Yorkshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 6. April 1276 in Cottingham, Yorkshire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Stuteville Heiress of Cottingham è nata il circa 1216 nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Nicholas de Stuteville, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Dervorguilla Galloway, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Hugh le Wake Sheriff of Yorkshire prima del 29 maggio 1229, nel Cottingham, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 6 aprile 1276, nel Cottingham, Yorkshire, England, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Stuteville Heiress of Cottinghamが約1216年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで生まれた時，父Nicholas de Stutevilleは26歳，母Dervorguilla Gallowayは23歳であった。1229年5月29日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアコッティンガムでHugh le Wake Sheriff of Yorkshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1276年4月6日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアコッティンガムで死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Stuteville Heiress of Cottingham(이)가 대략 1216년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas de Stuteville(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dervorguilla Galloway(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1229년 5월 29일 이전 영국 요르크실르 컷잉함에서 Hugh le Wake Sheriff of Yorkshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1276년 4월 6일 이전 영국 요르크실르 컷잉함에서 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Stuteville Heiress of Cottingham nasceu aproximadamente 1216, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas de Stuteville, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Dervorguilla Galloway, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh le Wake Sheriff of Yorkshire antes 29 de maio de 1229, em Cottingham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Stuteville Heiress of Cottingham родилась около 1216 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Nicholas de Stuteville было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Dervorguilla Galloway, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh le Wake Sheriff of Yorkshire перед 29 май 1229 г. в местности коттингхам, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 6 апрель 1276 г. в местности коттингхам, еркшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности Англия.

Se casó con Hugh le Wake Sheriff of Yorkshire antes de 29 de mayo de 1229, en Cottingham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de 6 de abril de 1276, en Cottingham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
